ENGNew: The Difference Between Mion and Shion...
changeReason: English translation was missing; ENG field contained untranslated Japanese text.

TextENGNew: ``By the way, Kei-chan. How did you tell me and Shion apart?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Tell you apart? ...Well, your hairstyles are different, so obviously I could tell.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``No, that's not what I meant... I mean, like...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``L-Like I said...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Mion's face was turning red, and she was fidgeting restlessly, rubbing her hands together.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...As I watched her mannerisms, I gradually understood what she was really trying to ask.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``You mean at Angel Mort? ...Well, it was instinct, I guess. But no matter how much she tried to impersonate you, your 'Mion-ness' was coming through in absolutely everything.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``M-My 'Mion-ness'...? L-Like what, for example?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Like the way you walk--all bowlegged. And the rough Edo-style slang that kept slipping into your speech...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``What?! R-Really?!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``I'm kidding.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``--K-Kei-chan!!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Hahaha, relax, you don't have those habits. ...But I can't really explain it in words. I just felt it at that moment--I knew it was you, Mion, almost without any doubt.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Yes, it was not something I saw or heard that tipped me off--I just... felt it. And for the same reason, at the toy store, I instinctively sensed that Shion wasn't 'Mion.'
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: I still could not explain why. If I had to put it into words, maybe it was some truly subtle sense of incongruity in her behavior...
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``--Kei-chan?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Oh, sorry. ...Anyway, when Shion linked her arm with mine, I just felt that something was off. Maybe it was--``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Maybe it was...?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``The, uh... volume difference I felt through my arm when she pressed up against me...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Mion's face turned crimson with a mixture of fury and mortification. ...Great, now she was going to explode. This was bad.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Kei-chan!!!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: I dodged Mion's raised fist by a hair's breadth. ...Yikes, maybe I had teased her a bit too much. Seeing Mion's face contorted in genuine rage, I felt a real sense of danger and bolted.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Get back here, you lecherous womanizer!! Down on your knees--it's the executioner's block for you!!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Y-You're skipping the trial entirely?! Whoa?!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: A pebble whizzed past my temple. I looked back to see Mion's arms loaded with a mountain of small stones... When had she even gathered those?!
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Get baaack here~~, you cheater!!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Hold on! Being chased for that reason is something I absolutely cannot accept!!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
